title: Netherite to Azurite
description: Netherite to Azurite turns Netherite into a real mineral called Azurite
body:
# **Netherite to Azurite**

Netherite to Azurite turns Netherite into a real mineral called Azurite.


## **This texture pack affects:**
	 
* Ancient Debris 
* Netherite Scrap
* Netherite Ingot
* Netherite Upgrade
* Netherite Armor
* Netherite Tools
* Block of Netherite 

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H6mPzRMm/images/bee2168351b2f17f057d5eea849baa4c552ca367.png)

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H6mPzRMm/images/ab645951138996870c125bcb7077ff617c217ffd.png)

![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H6mPzRMm/images/a92bb56c050eec9abee7ae9d66489f65b038410e.png)
